utest.cpp File Reference
#include "ros/console.h"
#include "log4cxx/appenderskeleton.h"
#include "log4cxx/spi/loggingevent.h"
#include <vector>
#include <stdexcept>
#include <gtest/gtest.h>
#include <boost/shared_array.hpp>
#include <boost/regex.hpp>
